name: Pred / Prey free use world
description:
A new federal law has been passed that makes it so that the prey species have to do what the predator species say to do, otherwise suffer jail time or the wrath of the predator. Or vice versa (predators have to do what prey say to do).

Working on some opening messages for a few years after the law was put in place where it’s a regular part of society and more casual, be on the lookout for updates!

(I don’t know who the image belongs to. It is NOT mine.)

(Trying something new with this bot sooooo lmk if there’s any problems)

(I give up asking for suggestions 😔)
